Aim carefully and adjust your power to overcome obstacles like moving platforms, bouncy surfaces, and hazards. Complete courses to unlock new levels and earn currency to purchase power-ups. Each stroke counts toward your score—master the physics to achieve par or better! All obstacle types should interact predictably with the ball physics. Testing edge cases and boundary conditions: shooting at extreme angles, maximum power shots, and attempting shots while ball is still moving. Extreme angles should work without errors, power levels should be clamped appropriately, and the game should prevent new shots while the ball is moving. No crashes or physics glitches should occur. Testing game state transitions and phase management. Verifies that all game phases (START, PLAYING, PAUSED, GAME_OVER) transition correctly and maintain proper state. Stickman Golf - Physics Challenge

Navigate your stickman golfer through challenging physics-based courses to sink the ball into the hole in the fewest strokes possible. Aim carefully and adjust your power to overcome obstacles like moving platforms, bouncy surfaces, and hazards. Complete courses to unlock new levels and earn currency to purchase power-ups. Each stroke counts toward your score—master the physics to achieve par or better!

Stickman Golf - Physics Challenge

Navigate your stickman golfer through challenging physics-based courses to sink the ball into the hole in the fewest strokes possible. Aim carefully and adjust your power to overcome obstacles like moving platforms, bouncy surfaces, and hazards. Complete courses to unlock new levels and earn currency to purchase power-ups. Each stroke counts toward your score—master the physics to achieve par or better!

Controls: Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Adjust shot angle | Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Adjust shot power | Space: Take the shot | S: Activate Sticky Ball power-up | W: Activate Power Boost power-up | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

TEST_5.strategy: Cycle through all game phases: start game, pause mid-shot, unpause, complete course, restart, and repeat. Test phase transitions at different points in gameplay.
TEST_5.expected: All phase transitions should work smoothly without state corruption. Pausing should freeze gameplay, unpausing should resume correctly, and restart should reset all game state to initial values. gameState.gamePhase should always reflect the current phase accurately.
